data.title: Fix run-overlay-retrospective.sh default output path to docs/findings/
data.description:
## Testing Mode
GREEN

Change the default OUTPUT path in plugins/dso/scripts/run-overlay-retrospective.sh from plugins/dso/docs/overlay-calibration-baselines.md to docs/findings/overlay-calibration-baselines.md. Update help text.

## Implementation Steps
1. Open plugins/dso/scripts/run-overlay-retrospective.sh
2. Change line: OUTPUT="${REPO_ROOT}/plugins/dso/docs/overlay-calibration-baselines.md"
   To:          OUTPUT="${REPO_ROOT}/docs/findings/overlay-calibration-baselines.md"
3. Update any help text or comments referencing the old default path
4. Remove RED marker from .test-index: update entry so
   tests/hooks/test-run-overlay-retrospective-path.sh [test_default_output_not_in_plugin_dir]
   becomes tests/hooks/test-run-overlay-retrospective-path.sh (no RED bracket)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Default OUTPUT path in run-overlay-retrospective.sh is docs/findings/overlay-calibration-baselines.md
  Verify: grep 'OUTPUT=' plugins/dso/scripts/run-overlay-retrospective.sh | grep -q 'docs/findings/'
- [ ] No reference to plugins/dso/docs/ remains in run-overlay-retrospective.sh
  Verify: test $(grep -c 'plugins/dso/docs' plugins/dso/scripts/run-overlay-retrospective.sh) -eq 0
- [ ] RED marker removed from .test-index
  Verify: grep 'run-overlay-retrospective.sh' .test-index | grep -v '\[test_default_output'
- [ ] Test from T2 passes GREEN
  Verify: bash tests/hooks/test-run-overlay-retrospective-path.sh
- [ ] validate.sh --ci passes
  Verify: plugins/dso/scripts/validate.sh --ci
